default.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ ẽãr̃l̃ỹ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃ ẽs̃t̃ãb̃l̃ĩs̃h̃ t̃h̃ẽ p̃ãc̃ĩñg̃. ⟧⟧

gradual_start.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃ b̃ũĩl̃d̃s̃ g̃r̃ãd̃ũãl̃l̃ỹ f̃r̃õm̃ ĩt̃s̃ õp̃ẽñĩñg̃. ⟧⟧

immediate_pressure.text: ⟦⟦ Ĩñt̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ ĩs̃ p̃r̃ẽs̃ẽñt̃ f̃r̃õm̃ t̃h̃ẽ b̃ẽg̃ĩññĩñg̃. ⟧⟧

unstable_opening.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ õp̃ẽñĩñg̃ s̃h̃ĩf̃t̃s̃ q̃ũĩc̃k̃l̃ỹ b̃ẽt̃w̃ẽẽñ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñs̃. ⟧⟧
